description: Reference workflows for agent-pack. Map tasks to agent + skill sequences.

workflows.name: Brainstorm → Diagram → Implementation
workflows.description: Complete feature lifecycle: explore requirements, visualize architecture, implement with diagrams as spec

phases.name: Explore
phases.description: Design-space exploration, requirements refinement, architecture decisions

phases.name: Visualize
phases.description: Create architecture/flow diagrams from brainstorming output

phases.name: Validate
phases.description: Check diagram completeness, labels, connections

phases.name: Spec
phases.description: Write formal spec with diagrams embedded

phases.name: Implement
phases.description: Implement feature following spec + diagrams

phases.name: Export
phases.description: Export diagrams to PNG/PDF for documentation

parallel_work.while_swe_implements: design-team creates UI mockups, backend team implements API

workflows.name: Quick Diagram Reference
workflows.description: Create a quick diagram for existing system documentation (no spec writing)

phases.name: Generate
phases.description: Create diagram from brief description

phases.name: Validate
phases.description: Quick completeness check

phases.name: Export
phases.description: Export for embedding in docs

workflows.name: Architecture Design Review
workflows.description: Review proposed architecture with diagrams, validate design decisions

phases.name: Generate Architecture Diagram
phases.description: Create architecture diagram from proposal

phases.name: Add AWS Shapes
phases.description: Find and add AWS service icons for clarity

phases.name: Validate Completeness
phases.description: Check all components labeled, connections clear

phases.name: Design Review
phases.description: Architectural review: scalability, resilience, cost

workflows.name: Database Schema Design
workflows.description: Design database schema using ER diagrams, validate, export for implementation

phases.name: Generate ER Diagram
phases.description: Create ER diagram with all tables, columns, relationships

phases.name: Validate Schema
phases.description: Check normalization, relationships, cardinality

phases.name: Export for Development
phases.description: Export PNG for reference during implementation

workflows.name: Process Flow Documentation
workflows.description: Document business processes with flowcharts and swimlanes

phases.name: Generate Flow Diagram
phases.description: Create flowchart or swimlane diagram from process description

phases.name: Validate Flow Logic
phases.description: Verify all paths, decision points, endpoints

phases.name: Apply Styling
phases.description: Apply organization brand colors and fonts

phases.name: Export for Documentation
phases.description: Export PNG and PDF for handbook/wiki

workflows.name: API Interaction Sequence Design
workflows.description: Design API interactions using sequence diagrams

phases.name: Generate Sequence Diagram
phases.description: Create sequence diagram showing client-server-database interactions

phases.name: Validate Interactions
phases.description: Check message flow, return paths, edge cases

phases.name: Export for Spec
phases.description: Export SVG for embedding in API spec

workflows.name: Research -> Plan -> Implement
workflows.description: Repo-grounded feature delivery with explicit decision gates and tracked artifacts.

phases.name: Research
phases.description: Gather constraints, current-state facts, risks, and feasibility.

phases.name: Plan
phases.description: Turn research into phases, acceptance criteria, and rollout order.

phases.name: Pressure Test
phases.description: Challenge assumptions, missing tests, migrations, and sequencing before implementation.

phases.name: Implement
phases.description: Execute phase by phase with tests and plan updates.

phases.name: Verify
phases.description: Check delivered behavior against plan and residual risks.

workflows.name: Cross-Model Plan -> Review -> Verify
workflows.description: Use one host to plan and another to challenge and verify against repo reality.

phases.name: Primary Plan
phases.description: Create tracked plan with phases, tests, and rollback notes.

phases.name: Second-Host Review
phases.description: Append findings based on actual code structure and blast radius.

phases.name: Implementation
phases.description: Implement approved phases without losing tracked review context.

phases.name: Second-Host Verification
phases.description: Verify acceptance criteria, docs, and test coverage against repo state.
